task: 455 — Rebuild and re-promote Meta-model on clean post-sidecar journal data
description: Pinned column allow-list for the meta-model training dataset, extracted directly from artifacts/ml-engine/app/training/meta_dataset.py. The trainer is allowed to read ONLY these columns from prediction_journal (plus the listed top-level keys inside gates_applied JSONB). Any column whose name carries one of `forbidden_prefixes` is contamination from the pre-#444 LLM/news/sidecar era and MUST NOT enter the training frame. Generated 2026-04-24 as the input to the no-contamination contract test (artifacts/ml-engine/tests/test_meta_no_contamination.py).
notes: feature_vector JSONB on prediction_journal still contains legacy `news_*` keys from the pre-#444 era — the meta_dataset SQL deliberately does NOT read feature_vector, so those keys cannot reach the trainer.
gates_applied JSONB also carries `meta_action`, `meta_kind`, `meta_version`, `meta_abstain_reason`, etc., but the trainer only reads `specialists` from it.
If a future schema change adds a forbidden-prefix column, the contract test in test_meta_no_contamination.py will fail loudly.
